description.p: GradientContour follows the contours of the target vector path. X1 controls the colour ramp floor and X2 controls the ramp multiplier.

field.name: X1
field.comment: Colour ramp floor for contour gradients.

description.p: The X1 value is used as the floor for contour gradient colour values. It has a valid range of 0 < X1 < X2.

field.name: X2
field.comment: Colour ramp multiplier for contour gradients.

description.p: The X2 value acts as a multiplier for contour gradient colour values. It has a valid range of .01 < X2 < 10.
